= Unknown. CHAR 2 x x
M0270_REHAB_PROGN (M0270) Rehabilitive Prognosis Rehabilitative prognosis: best description of patient's prognosis for functional status. 00 = Guarded: minimal improvement in functional status is expected; decline is possible.
01 = Good: marked improvement in functional status is expected.
UK = Unknown. CHAR 2 x x
M0280_LIFE_EXPECT (M0280) Life Expectancy Life expectancy (physician documentation is not required). 00 = Live expectancy is greater than 6 months.
01 = Life
